name: Canstar Resources Inc.
description: Canstar Resources Inc. (TSXV: ROX) is a Canadian-based mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of critical and precious mineral deposits. The company is primarily engaged in advancing high-grade projects in Newfoundland, including the Golden Baie Project, which targets orogenic gold and antimony, and the Buchans-Mary March Project, which focuses on zinc, copper, lead, silver, and gold within a world-class VMS mining district. Supported by an experienced technical team, Canstar utilizes disciplined exploration strategies and advanced modeling to unlock the potential of its extensive land holdings in central Newfoundland.
